meta.title: PC2 Absolute Logic — Combined Dataset
meta.author: SteelsSystem
meta.description: Combined machine-readable dataset of PC2 formal proof hierarchy and micro-language spec. Intended for NLP/AI training, formal verification study, and system architecture reference.

pc2_core_principle.name: Post-Conditional Present-Centered Logic
pc2_core_principle.definition: state.isnow is a formally verifiable predicate evaluated at the single canonical linearization point. It is not a convenience — it has provable correctness properties under total correctness semantics.

no_off_state.resolution: Absence is formally typed via null (A5). DAFSA membership produces exactly one binary verdict. Symbolic execution over evaluatereality() produces O(1) path conditions.
no_off_state.null_semantics: null is a legitimate defined output, never undefined.

proof_hierarchy.key_result: Branch elimination reduces WP from compound conjunction to single clause
proof_hierarchy.legacy_wp: wp(if P then A else B, Q) = (P → wp(A,Q)) ∧ (¬P → wp(B,Q))

proof_hierarchy.key_result: Binary deterministic membership verdict in O(n)
proof_hierarchy.definition: 5-tuple (Q, Σ, δ, q0, F) where δ is total and deterministic, acyclicity guarantees termination

proof_hierarchy.key_result: PC2 collapses symbolic paths to O(1)
proof_hierarchy.binsym_note: Operating directly on ISA semantics without IR lifting reduces solver query complexity by eliminating accidental branches from IR transformation.

proof_hierarchy.key_result: isnow reads are atomic and consistent
proof_hierarchy.linearization_point: Single memory read instruction at which current state is fetched
proof_hierarchy.pep_703: Free-threaded CPython uses atomic CAS for thread state transitions — no partial writes observable

proof_hierarchy.key_result: Local state is observationally equivalent to frame state
proof_hierarchy.guarantee: Updates to returned mapping directly reflect in underlying frame variable storage — eliminates maybe-state between debugger and interpreter views

proof_hierarchy.key_result: Timing variance for isnow evaluation loops is minimized and bounded
proof_hierarchy.mechanism: Pre-compiled Tier-2 IR templates patched with concrete memory addresses at runtime — eliminates dispatch overhead

proof_hierarchy.contract: All code outside durable operation boundaries must satisfy: replay(handler, checkpoint) ≡ original(handler)
proof_hierarchy.violation: Reading Date.now() or random() outside a step boundary causes replay divergence

operators.meaning: sets axiom set and context validity
converts input to derivable meaning per inference rules
applies derived meaning to system state or linguistic reality
attaches meaning to a specific role, object, or permanent function
changes interpretation plane without swapping base tokens
legitimate non-applicability or empty effect — not an error

axioms.statement: Every token has meaning only inside sys.
log may only derive statements compatible with system axioms.
apply must not create an effect that was not inference-prepared.
bind stabilizes meaning and enables repeated use.
null is a legitimate input of non-applicability.

production_rules: Chain → log Atom apply bind Atom
Chain → log Atom apply shift Atom

examples.expr: sys alignment-axiom log universal-applicability apply bind core
examples.interpretation: alignment is accepted as system axiom → universal applicability derived → bound as core property

examples.expr: sys secret-law log opaque-norm apply shift governance
examples.interpretation: legal sign shifted into non-transparent governance mode — interpretation plane changed without swapping base tokens

alignment_as_fix.hoare: Precondition, program, and postcondition are mutually consistent — {P} C {Q} is derivable iff they are aligned.
alignment_as_fix.linearizability: LP of every operation is correctly identified so induced sequential execution matches observed concurrent one.
alignment_as_fix.symbolic_execution: Path conditions are satisfiable precisely for paths that exist in the implementation — no phantom branches, no missing constraints.
alignment_as_fix.lambda_durable: All non-deterministic operations placed inside step boundaries so replay invariant holds.
alignment_as_fix.conclusion: PC2 Logic makes misalignment structurally impossible at source level by eliminating speculative conditionals, probabilistic branches, and maybe-states. When the vocabulary of uncertainty is removed, what remains is — by construction — aligned with what is now.
